message:
feat(cli): Add ProgressReporter with TTY detection and multi-mode support

- Add src/cli/progress.rs with:
  - ProgressMode enum: Tty, NonTty, Robot, Quiet
  - ProgressReporter struct for adaptive progress feedback
  - ProgressHandle enum for mode-specific progress updates
  - ProgressEvent struct for JSON robot mode output
- Features:
  - Animated spinners and progress bars in TTY mode (via indicatif)
  - Simple line-by-line output in non-TTY mode
  - JSON progress events to stderr in robot mode
  - Silent operation in quiet mode
  - Multi-stage progress support
  - Log and warning methods
- Add 13 unit tests for mode detection and handle behavior
- Expose module in src/cli/mod.rs

Closes: meta_skill-d8fo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
